violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Some cutting boards noited not properly maintained. Ice machine in upstairs kitchen noted not properly maintained.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Vent covers in downstairs walk-in cooler noted in need of cleaning.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): Personal phone noted in food prep area.
POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of salads/eggs etc was noted not being properly dated for disposition in the doctor's lounge.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Some cutting boards noted not in good repair in the main downstairs kitchen.
STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Clean Utensils noted stored on an absorbent surface in the drawer in the Heritage Kitchen area.
